Notes: Disk 2 and Disk 3 are two 8TB SATA HDDs attached to the onboard Intel RAID controller. RAID is configured in JBOD mode.

KnownDiskGroups.GroupName: Intel RAID JBOD SATA HDD pair
KnownDiskGroups.DiagnosticMeaning: Event ID 153 on these disks should be interpreted primarily as storage I/O retry on the SATA HDD / Intel RAID controller / RST driver / cable-port-power path, not as standalone Windows Update evidence.
